feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Safe Haven
entry.summary:
Author: writingtoprocrastinate

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,749Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 155

Summary: There's a safe haven drop at the firehouse that changes Bucks' life forever. ___ "Eddie nodded, opening the envelope, expecting a letter for the baby, health information, or simply a name to call the infant. What he found was none of those things. Eddie read the note as he ascended the stairs into the loft, pausing at the top, unsure of the correct course of action to come next. Ultimately, he decided that what came next couldn’t be his choice, and that the letter was addressed to only one person. “Buck?” Eddie called out, moving closer to the kitchen. He couldn’t find the words to continue, so when Buck looked up, Eddie just held out the letter." ___ Canon compliant up to "Mother's Boy."

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I'm Scared I'll Never Sleep Again
entry.summary:
Author: rated_diamond

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,020Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Eddie wanted to fall to his knees and weep at the sound of Buck’s voice. He wanted to beg for forgiveness for waking up so late. At that moment, he knew that he would have to be more careful. Waking up late wasn’t something he could do. He vowed that he would pay more attention to his alarms and his sleep schedule. He would listen to whatever and he would go to sleep on time and wake up on time. He couldn’t risk bad things happening all because he decided it was best to sleep in. OR: Eddie struggles with sleep and other aspects of life. He goes through a journey to find out what is going on with him.

entry.title: I'll Bleed Until I Find You
entry.summary:
Author: MoonlitRescue

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,476Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 194

Summary: Buck goes back into the water without thinking, without caring that his leg is already failing him or that the current is still strong enough to drag him out to sea. Buck finds Christopher. He brings him back. But when he wakes up, all he can remember is the moment Christopher was gone, the broken glasses in his hand, and Eddie’s trust turning into something Buck no longer thinks he deserves. Or What if Buck saved Christopher from the tsunami, and woke up convinced Eddie would never trust him again?

entry.title: but i’m tied tight (cut me loose)
entry.summary:
Author: hereforthevibess

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,073Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 44

Summary: The atmosphere felt tense. He tried to ignore it. “I think I’m like — wasted,” Buck whispered. And Eddie knew he wasn’t. There was no sight of red-rimmed waterlines or blown out pupils, no high flushed cheekbones or sweaty forehead. He didn’t stumble drunkenly to the dorm, nor did he slur his words back on the porch of the party. Just like Eddie, he must be close to stone-cold sober. “Me too,” Eddie found himself saying, in an equally hushed tone. It felt like giving himself permission for something dangerous. — or, Eddie tries to navigate the complexities of his two most important relationships in college — Buck and Shannon.

entry.title: The Buckley School of Later Life Sexual Education
entry.summary:
Author: AsperJasper

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,429Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 20

Summary: When they land on the couch, beers in hand, Eddie’s face almost hurts from smiling. He’d known that he missed this, but hadn’t realized how much until he doesn’t have to miss it anymore.“Oh! I have a surprise for you,” Buck says out of nowhere, cutting himself off in the middle of a sentence about his neighbor’s ugly garden decor. His smile, which had been bright and easy a second ago, turns sharp and teasing, and Eddie knows that Buck is about to do something stupid. “I was bored this afternoon.” He turns on the TV and starts fiddling with his phone. Eddie knows it’s going to be something ridiculous and over the top, because it’s Buck, but he absolutely is not prepared for what pops up on the TV when Buck connects his phone.“Jesus Christ, Buck.”Buck has the audacity to laugh in Eddie’s, now flaming red, face.“Sex education is important!” He says cheerfully. “Ahem. Pay attention, there’s a quiz at the end!”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: There's No You Without Me
entry.summary:
Author: 79KJ01

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,862Chapters: 16/30Kudos: 41

Summary: “Where are you driving from?” Eddie asked, his mouth moving before he could stop it, his brain deciding that awkward small talk was infinitely safer than just standing there vibrating with nervous energy. “East,” the guy replied with a casual, fluid roll of his broad shoulders. “Farther than I wanted to be, honestly. And definitely longer than I originally planned.” Before the army, before Los Angeles, and long before the 118, there was a dusty gas station on the edge of El Paso, a broken-down Jeep with Pennsylvania plates, and a stranger named Evan. For years, they were each other's entire world, surviving basic training, AIT, and a grueling deployment side-by-side. But a devastating wave of silence and a massive misunderstanding tore them apart, leaving behind a deep, soul-cutting ache and a history neither of them ever truly moved on from. Now, the past has finally caught up to the present. Standing under the harsh fluorescent lights of Station 118, Eddie and Evan are forced to navigate the wreckage of the life they left behind—and the terrifying truth of everything they never stopped running from.

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 88,505Chapters: 21/24Kudos: 650

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights?When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: Running Back Home
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,613Chapters: 4/12Kudos: 375

Summary: Buck is no stranger to being alone. He spent years fending for himself after leaving the house he grew up in, and even the years before that, he didn’t really have anyone.He thought he had found a family with the 118. He had a captain he came to see as a father, found a mother in Athena and a wider family from his coworkers and theirs. Buck even thought he might have a chance at something more with the man who was his best friend and his son. He should have known better. -+- A post-lawsuit fic (kind of) where Buck leaves and never really had any intention of coming back. The universe has different plans for him though. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: How Buck Gets a Cat And Everything Falls Into Place
entry.summary:
Author: Silly_sigma_boy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,166Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Meow …A curious cat called behind him. Buck turned around. The cat was a brown tabby cat with green eyes. One of the cat's ears were gone at the top and the cat was so tiny and fluffy.   “Hey? What are you doing out here?” Buck asked using that tone he usually did with the kids as he crouched down next to the cat. He knew he couldn’t take the cat because he had nothing for an animal at home and he didn’t want to be late for work. So he took off his jacket and placed it around the cat. ——— Post lawsuit and Buck is dealing with all the backlash from the lawsuit. He meets and adopts a cat, it changes everything and nothing

entry.title: The Lament Of The Void Child
entry.summary:
Author: A_rnie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,076Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: The first sensation was a gasp, raw and ragged, escaping my throat as a desperate, involuntary "Eddie!"The name was a lifeline, flung into an unseen abyss, a primal cry of recognition and yearning. But there was no answer, only a vacuum.‘Where was I? Where is Eddie? Eddie?The questions clawed at the inside of my skull, a frantic, futile search in a landscape of non-existence. Then, with the brutal clarity of a shard of ice piercing my very core, it came back to me:My Eddie was dead.My Eddie was gone. The four words hammered into my consciousness, each a death knell, echoing in the vast, empty chamber of my being.I would never again inhale his unique, comforting scent—a blend of old books, fresh rain, and something uniquely him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: gika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 185,333Chapters: 18/24Kudos: 123

Summary: When Eddie suddenly finds himself in debt and is desperate to prove his worth as a father, he decides to take on secret jobs as a male escort, all while hiding his new life from Christopher, his friends, and especially from Buck, the man who may always have been his true home.

entry.title: Once upon a Buckley
entry.summary:
Author: goldenbuck118

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,524Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 25

Summary: A prince searching for his mystery dancer is one thing. A prince searching for a single father with a five-year-old son, an overprotective sister, and a fairy godmother with questionable methods is quite another.

entry.title: The Tether That Holds
entry.summary:
Author: A_rnie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,446Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 5

Summary: If you can’t get a grip on this… if you can’t start being Buck again… I don’t know if you can stay here. Christopher is getting confused, asking why 'Buck' is so different. And frankly, I’m getting tired." Tired. The word was a death knell, a sharp, cold shard of ice piercing Koda’s already fractured heart. Ceru would never be tired of Koda. Ceru had carried Koda across the Burning Sands for three days without water, without complaint, his own life force ebbing, simply to reach a healing spring. Ceru had fought off desert beasts with a broken arm for Koda’s sake. Koda looked at the man standing before him. He saw the strange clothes, the short, neatly trimmed hair, the subtle lines of stress around his eyes, the way he constantly glanced at the clock, wishing for the day to be over, for the burdens to lift. This man wasn't Ceru. Ceru was buried deep inside this shell of a man named Eddie, suppressed by a world that didn't believe in magic, didn't believe in souls bound across lifetimes, didn't believe in a love that transcended lifetimes, death, and even dimensions.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: window of opportunity
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,435Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 267

Summary: By the third room Eddie can't keep pretending he doesn't get it, because Buck keeps sneaking these looks at him, quick, then snapping his eyes away and going pink at the ears, and Eddie — who has spent an embarrassing amount of his life being a complete idiot about this exact thing — finally lets himself think oh, he's like this because of me, and the thought makes him a little weak in the knees. "And through here," Buck says, leading them into the living room, "is honestly the best part of the place. Original hardwood, the built-ins are original too, and the natural light in here is just—" He throws an arm out wide to present the light. His hand goes straight through the window. There's a crack, then a second worse noise, and then a whole pane of the afternoon just leaves, drops out of the wall into the side yard, and the room goes very bright and very silent, and Buck is standing there with his arm still hanging through the hole where a window used to be. "Oh my god," Buck says. "Whoa," says Christopher, deeply impressed. Or,Eddie and Chris move to LA and Buck is their realtor.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Ghost and Impulse
entry.summary:
Author: shallythunder

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,390Chapters: 11/27Kudos: 8

Summary: After Buck gets hit by the lightning strike, he develops superpowers—a searing lightning bolt and the ability to fly. As he learns about his powers, and finds out Eddie has them too, they recruit Hen as their mentor, all while an honest-to-goodness supervillain blasts into town and threatens to shut off the city’s water supply in a desperate attempt to win back the attention of the President. Can Buck, who’s dedicated his life to saving people, actually hurt someone, even if he is a villain?

entry.title: I'll bring you home
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,533Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 154

Summary: After a tragic accident leaves Connor and Kameron’s son orphaned, Buck struggles with what role he’s supposed to play in Theo’s life — and whether someone like him could ever be enough for a child. Before he and Eddie can figure any of that out, the 118 is called to an active hostage situation at a Los Angeles junior high school. What starts as another terrifying call quickly turns into every firefighter’s nightmare.

entry.title: How to Train a Dad
entry.summary:
Author: Salve_El_Atun

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,268Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Evan "Buck" Buckley may be the most famous striker in Los Angeles, but that doesn't mean he has the first clue how to survive a four-year-old who's determined to turn every day into an adventure. When a series of unexpected changes leaves his career in the hands of Eddie Díaz —a publicist whose carefully organized life collides spectacularly with Buck's chaos— Buck begins to realize there are some things no amount of talent can prepare him for. Like being a dad.Like learning to let someone else in.And, most importantly, how to keep up with Theo Buckley. Fortunately for Buck, Theo has never had any trouble deciding who belongs in his family.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley & Theo
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley & Christopher Diaz & Eddie Diaz & Theo

entry.title: End of the Beginning
entry.summary:
Author: NocturneIgnis00

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,950Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 23

Summary: For a long time, Eddie Díaz felt like he was completely standing still. Caught in a ghost town of his own past, he found himself wandering through a maze of his own suffocating emotions. And just like everything else in his life, it all inevitably led back to Buck. To the piercing blue of his eyes. To the raw warmth of his joyful smile. Eddie knows he cannot afford to lose him—and he is willing to do whatever it takes to keep him safe, even if it costs him his own life.***Set after Season 9. When Eddie is critically injured during a catastrophic rescue operation, Buck is forced to navigate the harrowing wreckage of the aftermath, realizing that a universe without Eddie is a reality he is completely unequipped to face.***English is not my first language, but I am trying my absolute best with this story! I really hope you guys enjoy it. Comments and kudos are always highly appreciated! <3

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: must i dream and always see your face?
entry.summary:
Author: buddieseverlark

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,932Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 67

Summary: “It’s normal to have…sex dreams about people you’re just friends with, right?”The shock on Hen’s face would be comical if Eddie weren’t mid-crisis at the moment. “I’m sorry, sex dreams?”“No–not ‘sex dreams’, just…y’know, intimate ones.”“Eddie, it is 8:00 in the morning. You are seriously not making me start my day by answering a dumbass question like that.” Or, Eddie has an intimate dream about Buck and realizes that he's in love, but not before assuming that it's normal best friend behavior.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
